name: PluginRecord
summary: Metadata for a plugin that can be loaded into Navisworks. The information in PluginRecord is available even if the corresponding Plugin hasn’t been loaded.

returns.doc: null if the InterfaceRecord cannot be found

methods.name: LoadPlugin
methods.summary: Returns the plugin, loads it if required

methods.name: TryLoadPlugin
methods.summary: Returns the plugin, loads it if required

returns.doc: null if plugin failed to load

properties.name: DeveloperId
properties.summary: Gets the 4 character ADN developer code or a GUID. The combination of this and Name should make the plugin unique

properties.name: DisplayName
properties.summary: Text to display in the Navisworks GUI.

properties.name: ExtendedToolTip
properties.summary: Extended Tooltip to display when the Plugin is highlighted in the Navisworks GUI

properties.name: HasAttemptedCreate
properties.summary: Determines if an attempt has been made to create the Plugin.

properties.name: HasFailedCreate
properties.summary: Determines if an attempt has been made to create the plugin, and it has failed.

properties.name: HasFailedIsSelfEnabled
properties.summary: Where SupportsIsSelfEnabled is true then the plugin will be created early and IsSelfEnabled will be called to determine the result. Will return false if the plugin could not be created to make the call.

properties.name: Id
properties.summary: The full identifier for the plugin. This is formed as Name.DeveloperId

properties.name: InterfaceRecords
properties.summary: Returns a collection of InterfaceRecords that declare which interfaces we support

properties.name: IsEnabled
properties.summary: Gets whether the Plugin is currently enabled for use or not.

properties.name: IsLoaded
properties.summary: Gets whether the Plugin is currently loaded

properties.name: LoadedPlugin
properties.summary: Gets the plugin if loaded, otherwise null

properties.name: Name
properties.summary: Gets the name of the Plugin. The combination of this and DeveloperId should make the plugin unique

properties.name: PluginOptions
properties.summary: Gets flags for how plugins run

properties.name: SupportsIsSelfEnabled
properties.summary: Determines if IsSelfEnabled will be called.

properties.name: ToolTip
properties.summary: Tooltip to display when the Plugin is highlighted in the Navisworks GUI
